resource.description: The name of the resource that was being processed when the error occurred

field.description: (Optional) The specific field associated with the error

type.description: (Optional) A type associated with the error. `invalid_value`, `access_error`, `value_unavailable`

code.description: (Optional) A machine code relating to the error that occurred with the field and resource

message.description: (Optional) A human-readable message relating to the error that occurred with the field and resource
message.example: Name is too long (maximum is 40 characters)
